# Lumio Pricing Labels

**Author:** lumio_copywriter (step 5)
**Produced:** 2026-04-24T03:16:21Z

Three tiers, three short sublines. The pricing page title earns the click, the sublines prevent tier shopping.

## Tier labels

| Tier | Name | Subline | Price |
|---|---|---|---|
| Free | Reader | For the curious habit. | $0 / month |
| Paid | Deep Reader | For the regular reader who wants it to stick. | $8 / month |
| Team | Studio | For teams that read together. | $24 / seat / month |

## Section title

**H2:** Start free. Upgrade when it earns its keep.

**Subhead:** No seat minimums, no onboarding call, cancel from the settings page in a single click.

## CTA labels

- Reader tier: "Start free"
- Deep Reader tier: "Start 14 day trial"
- Studio tier: "Start a Studio"

## Reasoning

- "Start free" avoids "sign up", which feels heavier.
- "Start 14 day trial" is the only surface where we show a number, it belongs on the paid path.
- "Start a Studio" is the only surface where we use an indefinite article, because Studio is a workspace, not an account.
